title: JobStopRequest
description: Request body for stopping a running job.

@type.description: The resource type identifier. Must be set to "job".

taskId.description: The ID of the task to stop. Either taskId or taskName must be provided.

taskName.description: The name of the task to stop. Either taskId or taskName must be provided.

taskType.description: The type of the task to stop.

cleanStop.description: When true, allows the job to finish processing the current row before stopping. When false, stops the job immediately.
